name: gwf_rcm_h200
description: The GWFcoder radio module RCM-H200 from GWF MessSysteme eliminates the need to change meters for the migration of water and gas meters with GWFcoder to an LPWAN network. With simple and quick on-site installation via Plug & Play, no programming is require
author: Thinger.io
